title: Shri Durga Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Durga Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Durga.
description:
Jai Ambe Gauri,
Maiya Jai Shyama Gauri.
Tumko nishidin dhyavat,
Hari Brahma Shiv ri॥
॥ Jai Ambe Gauri ॥

Maang sindoor virajat,
Teeko mrigmad ko.
Ujjwal se do naina,
Chandravadan neeko॥
॥ Jai Ambe Gauri ॥

Kanak saman kalevar,
Raktambar rajai.
Raktapushp gal mala,
Kanthan par sajai॥
॥ Jai Ambe Gauri ॥

Kehari vahan rajat,
Khadag khappar dhari.
Sur-nar munijan sevat,
Tinke dukh-hari॥
॥ Jai Ambe Gauri ॥

Kaanan kundal shobhit,
Nasagre moti.
Kotik chandra divakar,
Sam rajat jyoti॥
॥ Jai Ambe Gauri ॥

Shumbh-Nishumbh bidare,
Mahishasur ghati.
Dhoomra vilochana naina,
Nishidin madmati॥
॥ Jai Ambe Gauri ॥

Chand-Mund sanhare,
Shonitbeej hare.
Madhu-Kaitabh dou mare,
Sur bhay door kare॥
॥ Jai Ambe Gauri ॥

Brahmani, Rudrani,
Tum Kamala Rani.
Agam-Nigam bakhani,
Tum Shiv Patrani॥
॥ Jai Ambe Gauri ॥

Chaunsath yogini gaavat,
Nritya karat Bhairon.
Bajat taal mridanga,
Aru bajat damru॥
॥ Jai Ambe Gauri ॥

Tum hi jag ki mata,
Tum hi ho bharta.
Bhaktan ki dukh harta,
Sukh sampatti karta॥
॥ Jai Ambe Gauri ॥

Bhuja char ati shobhit,
Varmudra dhari.
Manvanchit phal paavat,
Sevat nar nari॥
॥ Jai Ambe Gauri ॥

Kanchan thaal virajat,
Agar kapoor bati.
Shri Malketu mein rajat,
Koti ratan jyoti॥
॥ Jai Ambe Gauri ॥

Shri Ambe ji ki aarti,
Jo koi nar gaave.
Kahat Shivanand Swami,
Sukh sampatti paave॥
॥ Jai Ambe Gauri ॥
